title: CS2_C4
body: This mod introduces C4 explosives to Minecraft. You can obtain the C4 item from the Combat creative mode tab. Once placed, you can quickly defused the C4 using scissors—just like using cutting pliers. It can damage entities within a radius of 20 and a height of 10, with an explosion time of 40 seconds,  defused (without pliers) taking 10 seconds, and using pliers taking only 5 seconds,hold on and used 4 seconds can be planted.
